zh.Cheadle, Staffordshire, England: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾黑阿德爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph Basset於1331年出生在英國斯塔福爾布洛爾時，他的父親John Basset27歲，母親Joan de Brailsford13歲。他於1365年與Margaret Beke在英國斯塔福爾黑阿德爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1405年享年74歲。

zh-hans.Cheadle, Staffordshire, England: 英国英格兰斯塔福爾黑阿德爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph Basset于1331年出生在英国斯塔福爾布洛爾时，他的父亲John Basset27岁，母亲Joan de Brailsford13岁。他于1365年与Margaret Beke在英国斯塔福爾黑阿德爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1405年享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: Basset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from a diminutive of Old French bas(se) ‘short, of low stature’ (see Bas ).
English: variant of   Bassett  , a cognate of 1 above.
In some cases also an altered form of French Besset (see Bessette 2). Compare Bassette 1.

variants.name: Bas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Mauricio, Abelardo, Florencio, Francisco, Jorge, Luis, Manuel, Pedro, Soledad, Vicente.  Eastern Slavic Dmytro, Liya, Pyotr, Sergey.
Catalan: habitational name from a place so named in the district of La Garrotxa, Catalonia.
Basque: topographic name for someone who lived by a wood, from baso ‘wood, forest’.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph Basset was born in 1331, in Blore, Staffordshire, England, his father, John Basset, was 27 and his mother, Joan de Brailsford, was 13. He married Margaret Beke in 1365, in Cheadle, Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1405, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph Basset est né en 1331, à Blore, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, John Basset, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Joan de Brailsford, avait 13 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Beke en 1365, à Cheadle, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1405, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph Basset 1331 in Blore, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Basset 27 und seine Mutter Joan de Brailsford 13. Er hat 1365 in Cheadle, Staffordshire, England Margaret Beke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1405 im Alter von 74 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Basset è nato il nel 1331 nel Blore, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, John Basset, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Brailsford, aveva 13 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Beke nel 1365, nel Cheadle, Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1405, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Bassetが1331年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアブロアで生まれた時，父John Bassetは27歳，母Joan de Brailsfordは13歳であった。1365年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアチェアドルでMargaret Bekeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1405年に74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Basset(이)가 1331년 영국 스태퍼드실르 블로어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Basset(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Brailsford(은)는 13세였다. 그는 1365년 영국 스태퍼드실르 체아들일에서 Margaret Beke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1405년 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Basset nasceu em 1331, em Blore, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Basset, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Brailsford, tinha 13 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Beke em 1365, em Cheadle, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1405, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph Basset родился в 1331 г. в местности блор, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Basset было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Brailsford, 13. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Beke в 1365 г. в местности чидл, стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1405 г. в возрасте 74 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph Basset nació en 1331, en Blore, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Basset, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Joan de Brailsford, tenía 13 años. Se casó con Margaret Beke en 1365, en Cheadle, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1405, a la edad de 74 años.
